lastReleaseMessage: v0.15.0 framework alignment: code-to-Game-Design-Document parity (Lantern 4x4, 13 building costs, unit stats, per-shot Sonic Pressure)

barRaise.topFinding: The v0.16.0 Lantern Oil starvation loop, shipped in the working tree but not yet released, claims a wired mission-fail mechanic in the changelog that does not work in code. command_post.gd:300-301 emits lantern_oil_starved every frame Oil is at or below zero (no fire-once guard), and the gameplay scene never connects a listener to that signal. This is the central failure condition of M1 Hold the Wall. Pace is otherwise strong: 18+ versions on 2026-05-26 with clean voice audits and a passing source-integrity check. Wire the listener and add a fire-once guard before stamping v0.16.0.
